10543196.title: Ghosts
10543196.description: Fortune smiles on a cash-strapped Mike and Alison when a TV company comes calling looking for an old house in which to film their period drama. To get the money in the bank, Alison must ensure the shoot goes without a hitch.

10544077.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
10544077.description: Faced with some of the toughest challenges that live television can throw at a man: rancour behind the scenes, a viewer in danger, and a segment on ladies' fashion, Alan calls on `Sidekick' Simon Denton to step up to the plate.

10544195.title: Josh
10544195.description: Josh and Owen have tickets to the darts, but can't afford to get drunk in preparation - which is a bit like going to war without a gun, only more dangerous. Fortunately, Owen's cousin is getting married, so they head to the wedding in anticipation of some free afternoon drinking. What could possibly go wrong?

10544308.title: Friday Night Dinner
10544308.description: Mum's friend Val moves in and causes havoc when she finds that Dad is hiding a tin of 20-year-old meat in his shed.

10545176.title: Still Open All Hours
10545176.description: Granville has a large quantity of bargain spectacles to sell. Meanwhile, encouraged by reading a self-help book, Mr Newbold decides to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about their relationship, Eric tries to persuade Kath to go on a camping holiday and what is in the large, heavy box that has arrived for Leroy?

10545305.title: Antiques Roadshow
10545305.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

10546821.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
10546821.description: In Torquay, the team and local kind volunteers step up to help single dad Stuart, who has suffered with progressive multiple sclerosis since his now 15-year-old daughter Lauren was born. His primary carer is his mum, Grandma Lin, who is blind.
10546821.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid

10547047.title: Friday Night Dinner
10547047.description: Mum's friend Val moves in and causes havoc when she finds that Dad is hiding a tin of 20-year-old meat in his shed.

10548018.title: Josh
10548018.description: Josh and Owen have tickets to the darts, but can't afford to get drunk in preparation - which is a bit like going to war without a gun, only more dangerous. Fortunately, Owen's cousin is getting married, so they head to the wedding in anticipation of some free afternoon drinking. What could possibly go wrong?

10548900.title: Call the Midwife
10548900.description: With modern advances starting to change things for the better, even medical professionals like Dr Turner and Shelagh are forced to consider their own lifestyles. As they fight for better respiratory health for their patients, Timothy realises the risks his parents are running themselves by continuing to smoke.

10549874.title: Call the Midwife
10549874.description: A spate of violent attacks on women brings a state of fear to Poplar, and impacts directly on the residents of Nonnatus House. A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands. Meanwhile, a long overdue holiday for the Turner family fails to live up to expectations.

10550859.title: Doctors
10550859.description: Al reluctantly leads a shared patient consultation, and Bear may be out of his depth. A radio host, a graphic novelist and a timid man have something in common.

10550957.title: Doctors
10550957.description: Valerie sees omens everywhere, and Bear can't see what's in front of him. Zara has to step in when a one-night stand has disastrous consequences.

10551828.title: Doctors
10551828.description: A dog's death leads Rob to uncover a dark secret. Meanwhile, flirting is in the air, Daniel is flattered, but Bear is horrified.

10551922.title: Doctors
10551922.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

10552049.title: EastEnders
10552049.description: Callum's attempt to prove himself ends in ruin, Ruby goes head to head with Lily, and Rainie and Vi clash as Phil makes Kat an unexpected offer.

10552870.title: EastEnders
10552870.description: Callum can't open up to Ben, Kat comes up with a business idea, and Vi meddles in the Highway marriage.

10552918.title: EastEnders
10552918.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

10553026.title: EastEnders
10553026.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

10553865.title: Impossible
10553865.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10554021.title: Impossible
10554021.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10554902.title: Doctor Who

10560944.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

10561890.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10561890.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

10562812.title: Sanditon
10562812.description: Charlotte sets out to avoid Sidney, until an accident forces them together and to reappraise each other. When Tom brings a new doctor to the town, he and Lady Denham clash and Clara makes a bold move in her bid to outplay Sir Edward and Esther.

10562983.title: The Kettering Incident
10562983.description: Anna wakes out of a fugue in her father's house the morning after the party. Meanwhile, Chloe has gone missing and Grayson, Roy and Max seem to be sharing a dark secret.
